hero.headline: The litter box that cleans itself.
hero.body: Meet Pura Max 2, a self-cleaning cat litter box designed for a calmer home and a cleaner daily routine.

visual.label: Pura Max 2
visual.title: Pura Max 2
visual.caption: Balanced automatic litter care with a low-entry enclosed design and app-connected routine visibility.

image.alt: Pura Max 2 self-cleaning cat litter box with cat

careSystem.heading: Complete the Smart Cat Care ecosystem.
careSystem.body: Pair self-cleaning litter care with smart feeding and fresh water in one connected PETKIT routine.

items.title: Clean
items.body: Reduce daily scooping and keep litter-box status easier to follow through app-connected usage logs.

items.title: Feed
items.body: Support scheduled meals and remote check-ins with a compact camera feeder.

items.title: Drink
items.body: Support daily hydration with cordless filtered water, app monitoring, 3L capacity, and quiet 26 dB operation.

primaryProduct.name: Pura Max 2
primaryProduct.heading: Designed around cleaner routines.
primaryProduct.body: Every detail of Pura Max 2 is built to reduce daily scooping while keeping the litter routine safer, quieter, and easier to follow.

features.title: Automatic cleaning cycle
features.body: Designed to separate waste after use and reduce the need for daily scooping.

features.title: Safety sensor system
features.body: Sensor-based protection helps keep cleaning routines controlled around daily cat use.

features.title: App-connected routine logs
features.body: Usage and device status can be framed as routine visibility, not medical diagnosis.

features.title: Odor-control accessories
features.body: The sealed waste bin, K3 smart spray, and N50 2.0 deodorizer support a cleaner indoor setup without promising zero odor.

features.title: Low-entry enclosed design
features.body: A 200 mm entry height helps position the product for cats that need easier access than taller enclosed boxes.

features.title: Quiet daily operation
features.body: The 35 dB operating claim supports a calmer litter routine for compact indoor homes.

comparison.heading: Choose by household need.
comparison.body: Pura Max 2 stays as the main product, while other PETKIT litter boxes clarify the upgrade or alternative path.
rows: 76L interior, 7L waste bin, low 200 mm entry, 2.4GHz Wi-Fi, quiet 35 dB operation, and no camera premium.
AI camera features, 12 sensors, 8L waste bin, and 2.4/5GHz Wi-Fi support homes that need more identity and event visibility.
Lowest entry and disposable tray routine
Open-top design, 180 mm entry, and PETKIT Crystal Litter tray routine fit a different maintenance preference.
comparison.note: Hands-free duration, warranty, and pricing depend on market, purchase date, number of cats, usage frequency, and environment.

updates.heading: Be first to know
updates.body: Join the list for launch dates, pricing, and early-bird offers.
updates.disclaimer: Availability, pricing, and warranty terms can vary by market.
